requirements.text: Create a landing page with a welcome message and basic navigation structure
acceptanceCriteria: Basic navigation structure is in place

requirements.text: Set up basic backend actor with a health check method that returns application status
acceptanceCriteria: Health check method returns a valid response
Frontend can successfully call the backend

requirements.text: Implement a modern, vibrant design theme with warm colors (orange, red, yellow accents) inspired by Indian aesthetics, featuring bold typography and energetic layouts that create a friendly, social atmosphere
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme applied across all pages
Typography is clear and visually appealing
